content.text:
Based on the zoomed view, I can clearly identify the neighbour atoms of C:28. 

**Atom 28 (Carbon) has the following neighbour atoms:**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 27 | C (Carbon) |
| 29 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 30 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 31 | H (Hydrogen) |

**geomconf_index:** 6780

**Explanation:** Atom 28 is a carbon atom that forms four covalent bonds - one with carbon atom 27, and three with hydrogen atoms (29, 30, and 31). This forms a methyl group (-CH₃) attached to the aromatic ring system.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 28, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
